title: stipa parviflora subsp. contorta
intro: Stipa parviflora subsp. contorta, also known as bent grass or bent grass sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stipa parviflora subsp. contorta include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for internal use, and can also be used topically as a poultice or compress for external applications.
